'''Vercanne Mineral Technologies''' was a company that specialized in producing devices for explorers. Its most popular pieces of equipment were devices which could extract [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] and other necessary elements from subsurface deposits such as the [[FOE-2000]] [[oxygen extractor]].

{{Company-stub}}
